zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam de Hoghton於大約1310年出生在英國爾時，他的父親Richard de Houghton33歲，母親Lady Sybil de Lea28歲。他於1342年與Ellen Venables在英國英格蘭藍卡爾蘭卡斯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1386年在英國藍卡爾麗婭 霍爾享年77歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam de Hoghton于大约1310年出生在英国爾时，他的父亲Richard de Houghton33岁，母亲Lady Sybil de Lea28岁。他于1342年与Ellen Venables在英国英格兰藍卡爾蘭卡斯特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1386年在英国藍卡爾麗婭 霍爾享年77岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hoghton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Houghton
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places called Houghton or Hoghton. Most of the placenames derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some have different etymologies; for example, Little Houghton in Eccles (Lancashire), which derives from Old English halh ‘nook, corner of land’ + tūn, and Houghton in Bigbury (Devon), which may derive from an Old English personal name Huhha + Old English tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam de Hoghton was born about 1310, in Cheshire, England, his father, Richard de Houghton, was 33 and his mother, Lady Sybil de Lea, was 28. He married Ellen Venables in 1342, in Lancaster, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1386, in Lea Hall, Lancashire, England, at the age of 77, and was buried in Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam de Hoghton est né environ 1310, à Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Houghton, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Lady Sybil de Lea, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Ellen Venables en 1342, à Lancaster, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1386, à Lea Hall, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.Lea Hall, Lancashire, England, United Ki: Lea Hall, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Adam de Hoghton um 1310 in Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Houghton 33 und seine Mutter Lady Sybil de Lea 28. Er hat 1342 in Lancaster, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Ellen Venables geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1386 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Lea Hall, Lancashire, England und wurde in Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Hoghton è nato il circa 1310 nel Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Richard de Houghton, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Lady Sybil de Lea, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Ellen Venables nel 1342, nel Lancaster, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1386, nel Lea Hall, Lancashire, England, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam de Hoghtonが約1310年にイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Richard de Houghtonは33歳，母Lady Sybil de Leaは28歳であった。1342年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアランカスターでEllen Venablesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1386年にイギリスランカシュアイアレア ハルで77歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam de Hoghton(이)가 대략 1310년 영국 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Houghton(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Sybil de Lea(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1342년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 랭커스터에서 Ellen Venables(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1386년 영국 랭카실르 리아 홀에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Hoghton nasceu aproximadamente 1310, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Houghton, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Lady Sybil de Lea, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellen Venables em 1342, em Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1386, em Lea Hall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ro.Lea Hall, Lancashire, England, United Ki: Lea Hall, Lancashire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam de Hoghton родился около 1310 г. в местности чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Houghton было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Sybil de Lea, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen Venables в 1342 г. в местности ланкастир, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1386 г. в местности леа холл, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam de Hoghton nació aproximadamente 1310, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Houghton, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Lady Sybil de Lea, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Ellen Venables en 1342, en Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1386, en Lea Hall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Lancashire, Inglaterra.
